props.name: actionLabel
props.description: Label of the confirming action button.

props.name: cancelLabel
props.description: Label of the cancel button (also the Escape action).

props.name: actionVariant
props.description: Action button variant; use `"danger"` for destructive actions.

props.name: triggerVariant
props.description: Visual variant for the trigger Button.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Called when the action button is pressed (before closing).

props.name: closeOnOutsideClick
props.description: Whether pressing the backdrop (outside the panel) cancels and closes. Defaults to `true`; set `false` to force an explicit Cancel/confirm choice (e.g. for irreversible actions).

props.name: confirmPhrase
props.description: Type-to-confirm: when set, a text input is shown and the action button stays disabled until the user types this exact phrase (extra safety for destructive actions). The `confirmHint` labels the input.
